hero_subtitle: Discover our story, core values and long-term vision
history_para1: Founded in 2014, we started with a simple vision: to bring high-quality technology products to everyone at reasonable prices.
history_para2: From a small store, we have grown into one of the leading laptop suppliers in Vietnam.
history_para3: Today, we are proud to serve thousands of satisfied customers with a commitment to continuous improvement and service excellence.
vision_desc: To become the leading laptop provider trusted by millions of customers across the country
mission_desc: To provide high-quality technology products at competitive prices with excellent customer service
value_warranty_desc: Products are covered by official warranty
value_support_desc: Our customer support team is always ready to help
value_trust_desc: Earned the trust of thousands of customers
team_subtitle: Experienced professionals dedicated to serving customers
commitment_2: Competitive pricing compared to the market
